mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, plan_id, assessment_type, status, questions_json, answers_json, result_json, adjustment_suggestions_json, created_at, updated_at FROM assessments WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, user_id, plan_id, assessment_type, status, questions_json, answers_json, result_json, adjustment_suggestions_json, created_at, updated_at FROM assessments WHERE plan_id = #{planId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO assessments ( user_id, plan_id, assessment_type, status, questions_json, answers_json, result_json, adjustment_suggestions_json ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{planId}, #{assessmentType}, #{status}, #{questionsJson}, #{answersJson}, #{resultJson}, #{adjustmentSuggestionsJson} )
mapper.update: UPDATE assessments SET status = #{status}, questions_json = #{questionsJson}, answers_json = #{answersJson}, result_json = #{resultJson}, adjustment_suggestions_json = #{adjustmentSuggestionsJson}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
